00:14:29	Mihir Faujdar:	Hey everyone, my audio is not working properly currently so I would like to post an update for Lantern in the chat.

For devnet-4, local testing was done for multi-subnet (two subnets) setup using lean-quickstart which helped to surface message issues in Lantern.

For devnet-5, we have been keeping up with the new performance enhancements being made to the leanVM repo. The public devnet-5 image for lantern is still using the 8fcd commit. Locally i have updated it to use 3f2116d commit.

Urgent priority is to find the root cause for gossip decoding error reported by Partha. Trying to replicate the issue locally before confirming the fix for it.
